message:
fix: use panel.had_input instead of stale atomic for input detection

The has_pending_input atomic is cleared by processInputQueue() before
the frame capture loop runs, so it was always false. Use panel.had_input
which is set during processInputQueue and persists until after frame
capture — this is the flag designed for exactly this purpose.

Without this fix, the sentinel pre-check never detected input, causing
typed text to appear with ~1s delay until something else triggered a
full hash.
